Note on contract design & project implementation
paragraphs: ProLEDALL is a platform for the planning, consultation, and conceptual design of professional LED display solutions. The operational execution of projects (engineering, delivery, installation, and warranty) is carried out by qualified implementation partners from our network.

sections.title: Main implementation partner
lines: Managing Directors: Dipl. Ing. M. Abahssain, Uwe Kaiser

sections.title: Online dispute resolution (ODR)
paragraphs: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
afterLink: You can find our email address above in the legal notice.
We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
